hypothesis:
## Hypothesis

Incorporating dynamic shell-radius adaptation during the diffusion sampling process, where shell boundaries (currently fixed at 2.5 Å and 5.0 Å) are jointly optimized as learnable parameters conditioned on adsorbate identity and target adsorption energy, will improve generation quality for underrepresented adsorbate-surface pairs by allowing the model to discover optimal local environment definitions that vary across chemical systems.
